{
  "stage": "Workflow",
  "task": "Analyze VAE quantum-DNA encoding losses and recommend one training adjustment",
  "objective": "Diagnose latent space and encoding quality issues from loss components",
  "plan": [
    "Interpret KL, Hamming, and mixed-state loss magnitudes relative to reconstruction loss",
    "Identify dominant failure mode: KL dominance suggests over-regularized latent space",
    "Recommend reducing KL weight (beta) to improve latent utilization and reduce mixed-state loss"
  ],
  "handoff": "Validator should confirm reduced KL penalty aligns with latent space diagnostics and improves fidelity metrics"
}

}
